summary: Iteration 86 testing complete. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified: Executive Dashboard (CEO View) with KPIs, charts, and commission approval status; Internal Chat System with conversations and new chat functionality; CEO Commission Approval workflow with approve/revoke buttons; Color-coded closed leads (enrolled=green, rejected=rose); Net Pay scatter chart showing salary + commission data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 86 features fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/executive/dashboard returns KPIs (revenue, leads, employees, approvals), monthly_trend, revenue_by_course, top_agents, department_headcount, lead_sources, commission_approvals. 2) Chat APIs working: GET /api/chat/conversations, POST /api/chat/conversations, POST /api/chat/conversations/{id}/messages, GET /api/chat/unread-count, GET /api/chat/users. 3) CEO Commission Approval: POST /api/commissions/approve (approve/revoke for sales/cs), GET /api/commissions/approval-status. 4) GET /api/commissions/scatter-data returns salary + commission data for Net Pay chart. 5) Color-coded leads: stage-enrolled has emerald/green styling, stage-rejected has rose/red styling in index.css. 6) Executive Dashboard at /executive shows real-time company snapshot with charts. 7) Chat page at /chat shows conversations list with new chat dialog. 8) Commission Dashboard at /commission-dashboard shows CEO approval controls for Sales and CS departments.

executive_dashboard.details: GET /api/executive/dashboard returns KPIs, monthly_trend, revenue_by_course, top_agents, department_headcount, lead_sources. UI shows Executive Overview with all charts and data.

chat_system.details: All chat APIs working: conversations list, create DM, send messages, unread count, user list. UI shows Team Chat with conversations and new chat dialog.

ceo_commission_approval.details: POST /api/commissions/approve works for sales/cs with approve/revoke actions. UI shows approval status badges and approve/revoke buttons for CEO.

color_coded_leads.details: Enrolled leads have emerald/green background with ring styling. Rejected leads have rose/red background with opacity. CSS classes stage-enrolled and stage-rejected applied correctly.

net_pay_scatter_chart.details: GET /api/commissions/scatter-data returns base_salary, commission, net_pay data points. UI shows Monthly Trend chart with Net Pay (Salary + Commission) and Commission Only lines.
